meaning: adj.(犹太国王)希律一世的,希律王室的,效忠希律一世的
examples: But if there be any truth in Josephus's assertion, that John was put to death at Machaerus, it is hard to understand why he was buried so far from the Herodian fortress.
The harmony with Rome stretched Herodian Judea's borders into current-day Jordan, Syria and Lebanon.
